title: TikTok Music Posts Scraper
description: Extract public TikTok posts that use one or more specific TikTok music tracks.

musicIds.title: TikTok Music IDs
musicIds.description: One or more TikTok music track IDs. Batch multiple music IDs in one run to reduce Apify run overhead.

music_id.title: Legacy Music ID
music_id.description: Legacy single TikTok music ID input. Prefer musicIds for new integrations.

count.title: Posts Per Page
count.description: Number of posts to return for each music ID. Scrappa accepts 1-50.

cursor.title: Cursor
cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous run. Leave empty for the first page. The same cursor is applied to every music ID in this run.
